title: Week 1 (lacto-vegetarian conversion of original 'Veg & Eggs' plan)

Avoid banana, pineapple, grapes, custard apple, chikoo, lychee

title: Week 2 (lacto-vegetarian conversion of original 'Veg & Eggs' plan)
notes: Egg dishes replaced with vegetarian substitutes. Where the source already offered a vegetarian alternative (paneer or vegetable version), that alternative was retained as the canonical meal.

meals.serving: 1 methi chapathi + 30g paneer bhurji + lots of salad
1 glass juice (avoid banana) or tea with less sugar or 1 fist roasted nuts
1 bowl oats upma with green peas
